evals.name: basic-timeline-all-entries
evals.prompt: 帮我看一下 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas 项目最近所有的改动记录。
evals.expected_output: Agent runs query_timeline.sh, outputs sorted Change Log entries from all meta/*.md nodes, showing dates in YYYY-MM-DD format with node paths and summaries.

evals.name: tag-filtered-timeline
evals.prompt: 查询 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas 项目里 tag 为 auth 的所有变更记录，只显示最近 5 条。
evals.expected_output: Agent uses --tag auth --limit 5, returns entries only from mod_auth-api and feat_login, not from mod_payment or other unrelated nodes.

assertions.name: includes-login-feature
assertions.description: Also finds feat_login via auth tag

assertions.name: excludes-unrelated
assertions.description: Does not include payment module entries

evals.name: open-issues-query
evals.prompt: 查看 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas 项目里所有还没解决的问题。
evals.expected_output: Agent runs query_timeline.sh --issues, lists Open Issues section content from all nodes.

evals.name: summary-with-recent-filter
evals.prompt: 用 summary 模式查看 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas 最近 7 天的变更概况，告诉我改了多少条、涉及多少个节点。
evals.expected_output: Agent runs with --recent 7 --summary, output includes Summary block with entries/nodes/tags counts before individual entries.
